title: Quantum Thermodynamics: Information and Energy at the Quantum Scale
description: Explore the intersection of quantum information and thermodynamics. Learn about quantum heat engines, Landauer's principle, work extraction from quantum coherence, and the thermodynamic resource theory framework.
learningObjectives: Explain Landauer's principle and its quantum generalization
Calculate work extraction bounds from quantum states
Analyze quantum heat engines and refrigerators
Apply the resource theory framework to quantum thermodynamics
Understand the role of quantum coherence as a thermodynamic resource
Derive fluctuation theorems for quantum systems
